◎简　　介  

　　The House of Gaunt - Lord Voldemort Origins is a short film directed by Joris FAUCON GRIMAUD about Voldemort origins."The House of Gaunt" is an unofficial short film who tells about the Voldemort origins, inspired by the Harry Potter universe from J.K. Rowling's book « Harry Potter and the Half-Blood Prince ». It is freely adapted for the screen and directed by Joris FAUCON GR...
